title: The Back-End Law: A Universal Constraint Governing Collapse, Identity, and the Emergence of Existence
description: This repository contains the full LaTeX manuscript, Foundational Object (FO V1.0), Verification Protocol Object (VPO V1.0), and the complete AST-450 audit archive for the Back-End Law. The Back-End Law is a universal structural mechanism governing collapse, identity continuity, irreversibility, and the emergence of stable reality across substrates. The repository includes the formal mathematical framework, empirical pathways, cross-domain mappings, and the 450-audit verification record demonstrating structural stability, falsifiability, and cross-domain coherence.
notes: This deposit includes the complete LaTeX source (main.tex), the FO V1.0 raw object, the VPO V1.0, the AST-450 audit index, and all supporting documentation. Raw audit logs are included as plain-text files for transparency and long-term preservation.
